summary: 8+ years software engineering experience specializing in distributed systems, API design, and cloud infrastructure. Track record of delivering high-throughput services processing millions of events daily.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer
bullets: Designed event-driven microservices processing 2M+ events/day with 99.95% uptime
Reduced API latency by 40% through caching layer redesign using Redis and CDN optimization
Led migration of monolithic billing service to distributed architecture serving 500K+ customers
Mentored 4 junior engineers and established team code review standards

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Built real-time data pipeline processing 10TB/day using Apache Kafka and Spark
Developed internal CLI tooling adopted by 50+ engineers across 3 teams
Implemented automated testing framework reducing regression bugs by 60%
